x-enumeration-literals.name: Partial Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rewards used with another payment method.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Statement Offset
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rewards used to reduce account or card balances.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Direct Merchant Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rewards used at partner merchants for purchases.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Voucher Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Voucher / Coupon Payment: Rewards redeemed via vouchers or gift cards.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Service Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rewards used to pay for services

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Equivalent Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rewards converted to cash-equivalent value for spending.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Auto-Debit Payment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rewards automatically applied when a qualifying transaction occurs.
